pi_items.source: Explicitly required by the task.json description and checked in verifier.py.
verifier.py strictly enforces this 1024-byte minimum. Given the input SSRF file is 1.6MB, the corresponding UDDF export of its 29 dives will securely exceed 1KB.
verifier.py asserts the output UDDF has at least 5 dives. Parsing the downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf reveals it contains 29 dives, making a full export effortlessly satisfy this bound.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real dive data (SampleDivesV2.ssrf) sourced from the official Subsurface GitHub repository, containing 29 dive profiles logged by real dive computers. The target output file is '/home/ga/Documents/exported_dives.uddf'. Exporting all 29 dives comfortably clears the verifier's thresholds of at least 5 dives and a minimum file size of 1024 bytes.
